title: bartlettina xalapana
intro: Bartlettina xalapana, also known as xalapana or yerba de pasmo, is a plant species in the sunflower family (Asteraceae) native to Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Bartlettina xalapana include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Bartlettina xalapana can be prepared as a tea by infusing the leaves in hot water, or used in herbal remedies such as infusions, salves, and poultices.
